title: Micron’s Heavy Factory Spending Overshadows Booming Memory Sales
description: Micron Technology Inc. warned that it will need to spend heavily on production to meet burgeoning demand, overshadowing a generally upbeat forecast from the largest US maker of computer memory chips.

title: Presidential Candidate Says Colombia Must Bet on Oil and Mining
description: Colombian presidential candidate Paloma Valencia said that investments in oil, natural gas and mining can lift its people out of poverty.

title: The Math Behind Drake’s Lucky Spins
description:
Videos of influencers hitting it big on Stake.com are all over the internet. But at least some of those wins are statistically unlikely, a Bloomberg analysis showed.

(Corrects video to clarify the scope and details of Businessweek’s data analysis.) (Source: Bloomberg)
